---
title: "Set Theory"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    html-math-method: katex
---

This section covers set theory, in particular $ZFC$ set theory, and constructs the foundations of mathematics from $8$ axioms. Topics include basic properties of sets, functions and relations, ordinal and cardinal numbers, and ends with the construction of rational and real numbers.


## Table of Contents

- Introduction
  - History
  - Logic
- Axioms and Operations
  - Subsets
  - Powersets
  - Unions
  - Intersections
- Relations and Functions
- Cardinal Numbers
  - Equinumerosity
  - Equinumerosity Arithmetic
  - Equinumerosity Ordering
  - Finite Sets
- Ordinal Numbers
